name: quioteframework/whoops
description: Full-detail developer exception renderer for Quiote, built on filp/whoops. Only ever used when core.developer_exceptions is explicitly enabled.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/whoops/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
